description: Display your 16Personalities type with emoji and link

personality_show_description.description: Show a short description of the personality type
personality_show_description.label: Show description

personality_show_link.description: Show link to the personality type page on 16Personalities
personality_show_link.label: Show link

personality_url.description: Paste your 16Personalities test result URL to automatically detect your type
personality_url.label: 16Personalities Result URL
personality_url.tooltip: Paste the full URL from your 16Personalities test results page. The plugin will automatically extract your personality type from the URL.
